* **Architecture Selection**:
  * The architecture was manually selected based on a convolutional neural network (CNN) design. The CNN consists of two 5×5 convolution layers followed by max pooling layers, and two fully connected layers. This architecture was chosen to demonstrate the feasibility of the proposed scheme on the MNIST dataset.
